selected.title: Mitsubishi Lancer 2016–2017 Front Bumper Tow Eye Hook Cap Cover – 3D Scan Repair
selected.description:
This is a precise digital 3D model of the front bumper tow eye hook cap cover for the Mitsubishi Lancer 2016–2017.
The part was 3D scanned from an original OEM piece, then completely repaired, cleaned, optimized, and made ready for 3D printing.

Perfect for replacing a missing or damaged tow hook cover without buying an expensive OEM part.

Features

Accurate fitment for Mitsubishi Lancer 2016–2017
Clean edges, restored clips, and improved printability
Print-ready geometry (manifold, no errors)
Lightweight but durable design
selected.printSettings:
Recommended Print Settings
Layer height: 0.12–0.2 mm
Material: ABS, ASA, or PETG (for outdoor durability)
Supports: Optional (depends on orientation)
Post-processing: Sand + primer + paint for OEM look

selected.title: Yamaha FZ6 Front Fender - Para-lama frontal Fazer 600
selected.description:
Restore your Yamaha FZ6 to its original look with this high-quality 3D printable front fender (mudguard), modeled with precision from a real OEM part. Whether you're replacing a damaged one or customizing your ride, this file is optimized for FDM 3D printing and easy installation.

🛠️ Model Features:

Perfect fit for Yamaha FZ6 (2004–2009)

Reverse engineered from the original piece (3D scanned)

Clean geometry

Ready to print with minimal post-processing

Ideal for ABS, ASA, or PETG for better durability

⚠️ Disclaimer: This is a user-made replacement part and should be printed with strong, heat-resistant filament for best performance. Always test fit before use on road.

📦 Includes:

STL file for the front fender

🎯 Designed with passion for motorcyclists and makers!

selected.title: BMW E36 Door Handle Screw Cap | Interior Trim Cover
selected.description:
BMW E36 Door Handle Screw Cap | Interior Trim Cover

This is a replacement screw cap cover designed for the BMW E36 door handle. It fits over the inner door pull handle screw area (as shown in the reference image). Ideal for restoring the clean OEM look of your car's interior.


Designed specifically for BMW E36 models
Snaps into place easily
Restores original factory finish
Great for interior restoration projects
3D printable part for interior trim repair



⚠️ This is a custom-designed part for personal use or restoration. Not an official BMW product.



BMW E36 Kapı Kolu Vida Kapağı | İç Trim Parçası

Bu parça, BMW E36 kapı iç kolunun vidasını kapatmak için tasarlanmış bir vida kapağı modelidir. Orijinal görünümü geri kazandırmak ve iç trimdeki eksikliği gidermek için idealdir.


BMW E36 modelleri için özel olarak tasarlanmıştır
Kolayca yerine oturur
Aracınızın orijinal iç görünümünü geri kazandırır
İç trim restorasyonu için mükemmel bir çözümdür
3D yazıcı ile üretilebilir tamir parçasıdır



⚠️ Bu model kişisel kullanım ve restorasyon amaçlıdır. BMW ile resmi bir bağlantısı yoktur.

selected.title: Audi A3 S3 RS3 Front Bumper Fog Lamp Cover
selected.description:
Upgrade or replace your Audi A3, S3, or RS3 front bumper fog lamp cover with this high-precision digital STL file. Designed for 3D printing, this model ensures a perfect fit for your vehicle.

🔹 High-Accuracy Scan: The STL file is created from an original OEM part, scanned using a high-resolution, professional 3D scanner for maximum precision and detail.
🔹 Seamless Fit: Designed to match the exact dimensions of the factory fog lamp cover, ensuring an OEM-quality replacement.
🔹 Print-Ready Format: Optimized for FDM, SLA, and SLS 3D printers, allowing you to print with materials like ABS, ASA, or resin for enhanced durability.
🔹 DIY & Customization: Ideal for car enthusiasts, restorers, and body shops looking to repair, modify, or customize their Audi A3, S3, or RS3.

📩 Instant Download: Get the STL file immediately after purchase and start printing your replacement fog lamp cover today!

🚀 Perfect for professional and DIY 3D printing projects. Stand out with a customized front bumper look or replace your missing/damaged cover effortlessly!
selected.printSettings: Optimized for FDM, SLA, and SLS 3D printers, allowing you to print with materials like ABS, ASA, or resin for enhanced durability.
